title: TicketState
description: Compiled ticket state as emitted by `rebar show <id>` (and the library show_ticket / MCP show_ticket tool), and the element shape of `list` / `search`. This is replay-derived state, not an event. Unknown properties are allowed so the event-sourced shape can evolve without breaking consumers. Shared sub-objects (comment/dep/file_impact_entry/verify_command_entry) are $ref'd from common.schema.json.

ticket_id.description: Canonical ticket id (the directory name on the tickets branch).

attestations.description: Kind-keyed map of cryptographic attestation records (epic dark-acme-lumen): each key is an attestation kind (e.g. 'plan-review', 'completion-verifier') and each value is a signature record {manifest, algorithm, key_id, head_sha, signed_at, author} (the raw HMAC hex is stripped from public output). Additive across kinds, last-writer-wins within a kind, so independent gate attestations coexist instead of clobbering one slot. Omitted when the ticket has no attestations. The legacy top-level `signature` field is a back-compat mirror of the most-recent attestation.

last_reopened_at.description: ns-epoch timestamp of the most recent closed->open (reopen) transition; absent/null if the ticket was never reopened. Read by validity-on-read to invalidate an attestation signed before a reopen.

source_id.description: Provenance (P1.2 import): the ticket's original id in the source store. Present only on tickets created by `rebar import`.

source_created_at.description: Provenance (P1.2 import): the ticket's original creation timestamp (ns) in the source store. The local CREATE event uses a fresh HLC timestamp; this preserves the original for reporting/migration.

source_author.description: Provenance (P1.2 import): the ticket's original author in the source store.

source_env.description: Provenance (P1.2 import): the ticket's original environment id in the source store.

creation_channel.description: The public ingress that produced the ticket's genesis CREATE event (cli/mcp/python/jira/import). A legacy CREATE that carried no channel projects the projection-only fallback `unknown`. Immutable once set — an EDIT can never overwrite it. Distinct from actor/environment/source_* provenance: those record WHO/WHERE, this records WHICH INTERFACE.

creation_channel_inferred.description: Marks a `creation_channel` that was INFERRED for a legacy CREATE (a later story's concern) rather than recorded at genesis. Present (always `true`) only when inference ran; absent on tickets whose channel was stamped at CREATE.
